# IKE Workspace Extension

> Maven 4 build extension that prunes non-existent <subprojects>
> entries from workspace POMs before model validation. Lets a
> fresh clone of an IKE workspace bootstrap with mvn ws:scaffold-init
> before any subproject directory is on disk.

## Documentation

- [IKE Workspace Extension](https://github.com/IKE-Network/ike-workspace-extension/index.html.md)

## Other
